item.title: About
item.description:
I received my bachelor’s degree in mathematics from Columbia University in May 2025, where I was fortunate to be advised by Prof. Duong H. Phong.

My preferred first name is Changyoon, but I also go by Chang.

Email: cs4056@columbia.edu

item.title: Expository Articles
item.description:
• Bachelor’s Thesis: PDF
  • Weyl Integration Formula: PDF
  • Unramified Extensions in Local Fields: PDF
  • Lie Correspondence (handwritten): PDF
  • Deligne–Lusztig Theory (handwritten): PDF

item.title: Teaching
item.description:
I have extensive experience as a teaching assistant and professional tutor in mathematics.

Teaching Assistant — Columbia University (New York, NY)

  • Differential Geometry - Fall 2022
  • Intro to Higher Mathematics - Fall 2023 and 2024
  • Calculus I — Spring 2023 and 2025
  • Calculus II — Spring 2024

Responsibilities included leading discussion sections, holding office hours, grading assignments and exams, and providing individual student support.

Tutoring Experience - Prestige Institute (Palisades Park, NJ)

  • SAT/ACT Mathematics
  • AP Calculus AB/BC
  • Pre-calculus and Algebra
  • One-on-one and small-group instruction
